PRECISE_LOCATION.description: User or device physical location within an area less than 3 square kilometers, such as location provided by Android’s ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION permission.

APPROX_LOCATION.description: User or device physical location to an area greater than or equal to 3 square kilometers, such as the city a user is in, or location provided by Android’s ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION permission.

USER_ACCOUNT.description: Identifiers that relate to an identifiable person. For example, an account ID, account number, or account name.

NAME.description: How a user refers to themselves, such as their first or last name, or nickname.

ADDRESS.description: A user’s address, such as a mailing or home address.

RACE_ETHNICITY.description: Information about a user’s race or ethnicity.

POLITICAL_RELIGIOUS_BELIEFS.description: Information about a user’s political or religious beliefs.

SEXUAL_ORIENTATION.description: Information about a user’s sexual orientation.

PERSONAL_INFO_OTHER.description: Any other personal information such as date of birth, gender identity, veteran status, etc.

CREDIT_DEBIT_BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.description: Information about a user’s financial accounts such as credit card number.

PURCHASE_HISTORY.description: Information about purchases or transactions a user has made.

CREDIT_SCORE.description: Information about a user’s credit score.

FINANCIAL_INFO_OTHER.description: Any other financial information such as user salary or debts.

HEALTH.description: Information about a user's health, such as medical records or symptoms.

FITNESS.description: Information about a user's fitness, such as exercise or other physical activity.

EMAILS.description: A user’s emails including the email subject line, sender, recipients, and the content of the email.

SMS_CALL_LOG.description: A user’s text messages including the sender, recipients, and the content of the message.

OTHER_MESSAGES.description: Any other types of messages. For example, instant messages or chat content.

AUDIO.description: A user’s voice such as a voicemail or a sound recording.

OTHER_AUDIO.description: Any other user-created or user-provided audio files.

FILES_AND_DOCS.description: A user’s files or documents, or information about their files or documents such as file names.

CALENDAR.description: Information from a user’s calendar such as events, event notes, and attendees.

CONTACTS.description: Information about the user’s contacts such as contact names, message history, and social graph information like usernames, contact recency, contact frequency, interaction duration and call history.

APP_INTERACTIONS.description: Information about how a user interacts with the app. For example, the number of times they visit a page or sections they tap on.

IN_APP_SEARCH_HISTORY.description: Information about what a user has searched for in your app.

APPS_ON_DEVICE.description: Information about the apps installed on a user's device.

USER_GENERATED_CONTENT.description: Any other user-generated content not listed here, or in any other section. For example, user bios, notes, or open-ended responses.

OTHER_ACTIONS.description: Any other user activity or actions in-app not listed here such as gameplay, likes, and dialog options.

WEB_BROWSING_HISTORY.description: Information about the websites a user has visited.

CRASH_LOGS.description: Crash log data from your app. For example, the number of times your app has crashed, stack traces, or other information directly related to a crash.

PERFORMANCE_DIAGNOSTICS.description: Information about the performance of your app. For example battery life, loading time, latency, framerate, or any technical diagnostics.

OTHER_APP_PERFORMANCE.description: Any other app performance data excluding crash log data (e.g., stack traces) and diagnostics (e.g., battery life, loading time, latency, or framerate).

DEVICE_ID.description: Identifiers that relate to an individual device, browser or app. For example, an IMEI number, MAC address, Widevine Device ID, Firebase installation ID, or advertising identifier.
